name: Cucumber Soup with Pistou
recipeIngredient: 1 Leek (white part plus 1 inch of green) chopped
1 lb Cucumbers, peeled, halved, seeded, and chopped
1/2 medium tomato, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the soup: In a medium-size saucepan, heat olive oil over low heat. Add leeks and celery and cook until vegetables are soft, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add cucumbers, lemon juice, and stock. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until cucumbers are tender. Cool slightly.
To prepare Pistou: With a mortar and pestle, mash together garlic, basil, and walnuts to a paste. (You can also use a bowl with a wooden spoon.) Work in a little cheese and oil, then add one-third of the tomato. Keep adding cheese, oil, and tomato until the mixture is a barely fluid paste.
Transfer cucumber mixture to a food processor or blender and puree in batches until smooth. Ladle soup into serving bowls. Pass the pistou over the soup, allowing 1 tablespoon per serving. Place the pistou in the center of each bowl and swirl it into the soup before serving.
